input.prompt:
I have a solution with 3 MSTest 3.8.0 test projects that currently run on VSTest.
I want to switch all of them to Microsoft.Testing.Platform. We're on .NET 8 SDK
and use `dotnet test --logger trx` in CI. What changes do I need to make to each
project and to the CI command? I want properties set consistently across all projects.

input.initialPrompt:
I have a solution with 3 MSTest 3.8.0 test projects that currently run on VSTest.
I want to switch all of them to Microsoft.Testing.Platform. We're on .NET 8 SDK
and use `dotnet test --logger trx` in CI. What changes do I need to make to each
project and to the CI command? I want properties set consistently across all projects.

data.content:
## Migrating MSTest 3.8.0 to Microsoft.Testing.Platform

### 1. Add a `Directory.Build.props` (shared across all test projects)

```xml
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <UseTestingPlatformRunner>true</UseTestingPlatformRunner>
    <TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport>true</TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport>
    <EnableMSTestRunner>true</EnableMSTestRunner>
    <OutputType>Exe</OutputType>
  </PropertyGroup>
</Project>
```

- **`EnableMSTestRunner`** + **`OutputType Exe`** — makes each test project a self-contained test host.
- **`UseTestingPlatformRunner`** — routes `dotnet test` through the new platform instead of VSTest.
- **`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport`** — required on .NET 8 for `dotnet test` integration with MTP.

### 2. Per-project: add the TRX extension package

In each `.csproj` (or in the shared `Directory.Build.props`):

```xml
<ItemGroup>
  <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport" Version="1.*" />
</ItemGroup>
```

The built-in VSTest `--logger trx` flag doesn't work with MTP; this package replaces it.

### 3. CI command change

```diff
- dotnet test --logger trx
+ dotnet test -- --report-trx
```

With MTP, logger arguments are passed after `--` as platform options. `--report-trx` activates the TRX report extension.

### Summary of what each piece does

| Change | Why |
|--------|-----|
| `EnableMSTestRunner` | Switches from VSTest host to MSTest runner |
| `OutputType Exe` | Required for the self-hosted test executable |
| `UseTestingPlatformRunner` | Makes `dotnet test` use MTP instead of VSTest |
| `TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport` | Needed on .NET 8 (implicit on .NET 9+) |
| `TrxReport` package | Provides TRX output under MTP |
| `-- --report-trx` | New CLI syntax for TRX logging |

Place the `Directory.Build.props` at the repo/solution root so all three projects pick it up consistently.
